items.title: Bitcoin slips from near $80,000 as oil price increase weighs on risk assets
items.summary: Bitcoin dips after testing $80,000 as oil surges and traders stay bearish, even though a breakout hints the rally could accelerate on short squeezes.

items.title: More than 100 crypto firms urge Senate to move on U.S. market structure bill
items.summary: Key priorities include defining clear SEC and CFTC oversight roles, protecting non-custodial developers, simplifying disclosure rules, and avoiding a patchwork of state laws.
